new: Pebble boss waves now spawn three beer bottles on the map. Pebble hunts them before the sauna, and each bottle it eats buffs later Pebble encounters in the same run.
improved: Pebble now starts at 320 HP and comes back with +40 HP on each later Pebble encounter in the same run.
Boss HUD now surfaces Pebble bottle progress with live `Bottles` and `Bottle Stacks` tags during Pebble waves.
fixed: Recruitment market actions are now fully dock-native again. Refresh, per-offer reroll, level up, and buys clear any stale legacy recruit popup state instead of reopening the old right-side market panel.
Pebble bottle targets now render directly on the board, and selected Pebble stats reflect the live boss damage/max HP values instead of stale archetype-only numbers.
